description: Avatar Neck Offset is a component that allows for dynamically lengthening and shortening the neck of an avatar.

fields.Priority: How much priority this component takes over other components that constrain or change Avatar Pose Nodes
fields.Offset: How much to offset the user's neck from it's original position in local space.
fields._activeUser: Internal. Automatically updates to active user of this component that's being affected by it.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: The effect of this component when used updates instantly.
